nasb.text: There shall be an opening at its top in the middle of it; around its opening there shall be a binding of woven work, like the opening of a coat of mail, so that it will not be torn.

esv.text: It shall have an opening for the head in the middle of it, with a woven binding around the opening, like the opening in a garment, so that it may not tear.

cnv.text: 在長外袍的正中，頭部的地方，要有一個領口，領口的周圍要有領邊，是用紡織的細工織成，如同戰袍的領口一樣，免得長外袍破裂。

ccb.text: 袍上要留领口，还要在领口周围织领边，好像铠甲上的领口，免得领口破裂。
